description: Python engine lifecycle hooks. Style-aware, architecture-first.

hooks.prompt:
DOMAIN: python-dev-skill
IF task involves: Python code, FastAPI, Django, async, ML/data science, packaging, or PyO3 bindings
THEN: Read ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/SKILL.md for architecture guidance + style posture.
RATIONALE: Python idioms evolve fast (uv, ruff, Pydantic v2). Doctrine ensures current best practices.
IF_SKIP: Risk outdated Python patterns.

VERIFY: If Python code was written, did it follow the engine's style posture (type hints, Pydantic boundaries, async-first where appropriate)?
IF_NO: Review ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/references/style-and-architecture.md before completing.
